title: Resource APIs, Idempotency, Concurrency, Pagination, and Consistency · Inference Brief: Outbox Consistency
summary: The API exposes table-shaped routes, replays writes by key without comparing content, uses offset pagination under mutation, and publishes events outside transaction consistency. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts outbox consistency increment in consistent resource API and operation ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.
Design stable cursor ordering, tie breakers, direction, signed opaque cursors, filters, snapshot expectations, limits, and insert or delete behavior.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Node and Express server Predict Outbox Consistency · Theory Outbox Consistency
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory team handles case 9184 in a partner integration using an older generated TypeScript client. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to join idempotency fingerprints, optimistic concurrency, and transactional outbox evidence; show recovery after the overload input is removed; then replace an average latency claim with p95 and event-loop saturation evidence. Browser code models pure decisions only. Node, Express, listener, TLS, PostgreSQL, proxy, worker, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Persist state and an outbox fact atomically, publish with deduplication and ordering assumptions, and reconcile stuck or duplicate delivery.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Outbox Consistency contract for the supplied data.
